report.summary: UX polish for today's new build pages — added Breadcrumb navigation, fixed OG image endpoint, added comprehensive ARIA labels and semantic landmarks to Telegram Trading Bots guide; added ARIA labels to Virtuals Protocol stats grid.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added Breadcrumb component to Telegram Trading Bots Guide (Home > Learn > Telegram Trading Bots Guide) for consistent navigation
Fixed OG image URL from non-existent static file to dynamic /api/og endpoint with correct learn type theming
Added Twitter card image metadata (was missing images array in twitter config)
Added aria-label to stats grid with role=list/listitem for screen readers (6 stats: Daily Bot Volume, Total Users, etc.)
Added scope='col' attributes to both comparison tables (Fee Comparison and Bots vs CEX) for accessibility
Added aria-label to both tables describing their content for screen readers
Added role=list and aria-label to bot cards section (Top Telegram Trading Bots) with per-card aria-labels showing name, volume, and users
Added role=list and aria-label to Critical Risks section with role=listitem on each risk
Converted bottom CTA div to semantic <nav> element with aria-label='Related tools'
Improved stats grid responsive layout: changed from grid-cols-2 to grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 for better tablet display
Added role=list/listitem and aria-label to Virtuals Protocol stats grid (6 stats: Market Cap, Agents Launched, etc.)

sections.title: OG Images & Social Metadata Fixed
items: OG image: Telegram Trading Bots (/api/og?title=Telegram+Crypto+Trading+Bots+Guide+2026&category=Learn&type=learn) — 1200x630, was previously pointing to non-existent static file
Twitter card image added for Telegram Trading Bots (was missing from twitter metadata config)

sections.title: Audit Findings (No Fix Required)
items: Virtuals Protocol page — already split into server/client components with proper metadata from earlier design cycle today
Virtuals Protocol CTA buttons — already have proper aria-labels and min-height:44px touch targets
Virtuals Protocol breadcrumb — already present with proper Breadcrumb component
Both pages have proper structured data (ArticleStructuredData, FAQStructuredData) — no changes needed

files_changed: src/app/learn/telegram-trading-bots-guide-2026/page.tsx (added Breadcrumb, fixed OG image, added ARIA labels, semantic nav, responsive grid)
